title: MineSmooth 256x
description: A high-definition, faithful upgrade to Minecraft with smooth, clean, and detailed textures that keep the base style.
body:
MineSmooth 256x is the definitive HD version of the pack. It brings a highly detailed and refined look to Minecraft while staying faithful to the original style. Textures are smoother, cleaner, and have a slightly cartoon feeling, making every block feel more alive and premium without breaking the classic atmosphere. It improves readability, visual comfort, and immersion while still feeling like Minecraft.


note:im going to publish a new pack you can go see a preview of the pack on my tiktok account deadoo16 and you can subscribe to be notified when the pack is out :)
